articles.title: Pope Leo takes aim at 'handful of tyrants' spending billions on war amid tensions with Trump - NPR
articles.description: Pope Leo XIV condemns "tyrants" fueling war with billions. His calls for global peace during his Africa trip come amid rising tensions with President Trump.
articles.content:
LAGOS, Nigeria Pope Leo XIV has delivered striking remarks in Cameroon, condemning global leaders who, he said, are "ravaging the world" by spending billions on war.
